default: Welcome to your dashboard. Here’s an overview of your key tasks and metrics.
superadmin: Welcome, Super Admin. You have full access to RBAC, users, teams, templates, logs, and system settings.
marketing_head: Welcome back, Marketing Head. Lead campaigns, track ROI, and manage your team’s performance from here.
marketing_manager: Welcome, Marketing Manager. Manage campaigns, leads, and day-to-day marketing operations.
recruitment_head: Welcome, Recruitment Head. Oversee admissions, leads, applications, and recruitment strategy from one place.
admission_spoc: Welcome, Admission SPOC. Handle leads, applications, and applicant communication efficiently.
hr_head: Welcome, HR Head. Oversee payroll, budget, reports, and people operations from your command center.
hr_manager: Welcome, HR Manager. Manage daily HR tasks, approvals, and team coordination.
admin_head: Welcome, Admin Head. Control user roles, departments, settings, and system configuration.
admin_manager: Welcome, Admin Manager. Support admin operations, roles, and day-to-day administration.
it_head: Welcome, IT Head. Monitor systems, support tickets, and technology across the organization.
director: Welcome, Director. Your command center for performance, approvals, strategy, and organization-wide insights.
dean: Welcome, Dean. Oversee academic and operational performance for your college or division.
hod: Welcome, Head of Department. Manage your department’s metrics, team, and priorities.
senior_professor: Welcome, Senior Professor. Access teaching, research, and academic resources.
professor: Welcome, Professor. Your hub for courses, assignments, and academic tools.
student: Welcome, Student. View your courses, schedule, and academic progress.
parent: Welcome, Parent. Stay updated on your ward’s progress and school communications.
exam_head: Welcome, Exam Head. Manage exam schedules, papers, and results from here.
library_head: Welcome, Library Head. Oversee library resources, usage, and operations.
transport_head: Welcome, Transport Head. Manage routes, vehicles, and transport operations.
procurement_manager: Welcome, Procurement Manager. Manage purchase requests, vendors, and procurement operations from here.
sales_enablement_manager: Welcome, Sales Enablement Manager. Enable the sales team with content, training, and playbooks.
